<?php namespace libphonenumber\Leniency; use libphonenumber\PhoneNumber; use libphonenumber\PhoneNumberUtil; class Possible extends AbstractLeniency { protected static $level = 1; /** * Phone numbers accepted are PhoneNumberUtil::isPossibleNumber(), but not necessarily * PhoneNumberUtil::isValidNumber(). * * @param string $candidate * @return bool */ public static function verify(PhoneNumber $number, $candidate, PhoneNumberUtil $util) { return $util->isPossibleNumber($number); } }
